name: agent-orchestration
description: Planning, task decomposition, and multi-agent execution workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, split, and execute complex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates planning mode, task lifecycles, and multi-agent decomposition for large repository changes.
defaultPrompt: Create a phased implementation plan and execute by priority.
Split this refactor into independent parallel workstreams.
Convert this objective into trackable tasks with clear ownership.
